rationale.R1.3: The critique thoroughly examines the evidence (the correlation values and their interpretation) and provides detailed feedback on how to improve the analysis, which involves checking every claim against the corresponding data.
rationale.RX.1: The critique clearly marks uncertainty where appropriate, such as when inferring the sign orientation of AmbiAlign from the section's definitions and noting that some claims cannot be verified from the artifact alone.
rationale.RX.3: The critique covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: The critique does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only points out existing issues in the paper's analysis and recommendations.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, such as specifying which parts of the text need to be revised.
